out-of-scope.reason: DOM events — no user, no runtime
Scripting — no JS runtime
Web application APIs — no runtime
document.write / innerHTML — runtime mutation
Editing API — no user
Interaction surfaces — no user
Dynamic canvas — runtime
Canvas 2D manual tests — JS-driven draw calls into `getContext('2d')`. The reference also runs JS, so a vacuous match would inflate the pass count without exercising our renderer
Canvas tentative `beginLayer()`/`endLayer()` API — JS-only
Canvas tentative filter API (`CanvasFilterObject`) — JS-only
OffscreenCanvas — JS runtime + worker context
Form submission / runtime — out of scope (rendering is in)
showModal / close — runtime (open-state rendering is in)
details toggle behaviour — runtime (open-state rendering is in)
Popover invocation — runtime (popover-open rendering is in)
iframe sandbox runtime — static rendering of fetched content is in scope
COEP — runtime
COOP — runtime
Dynamic CDATA insertion — script-driven (`createCDATASection` then `takeScreenshot`)
Dynamic video state — runtime poster swaps
Video playback state — runtime
<template>-based clone with runtime poster — runtime
Runtime style mutation under animation — script-driven
Network-resolved <base> + external stylesheet — runtime
rel/type matching against stylesheet load — runtime
Audio with no controls renders nothing visible — the test asserts pixel layout that depends on widget chrome shape we don't emit
Canvas runtime — script paints the canvas content
blob: URL revocation under print — runtime URL lifetime
External CSS resource referenced from inside an — needs sub-resource loader for the inner SVG
Content-Type header parsing on image fetch — needs HTTP loader

pending-substrate.reason: srcset selection — needs resource loader + DPR policy
Responsive image selection in print mode — needs resource loader + print DPR policy
picture element — needs resource loader for source selection
video poster extraction — needs resource loader
iframe static rendering of fetched content — needs resource loader
<object data=> — needs resource loader
Top-layer element ignores its parent's clip/transform/filter/opacity/will-change/contain. Needs out-of-flow top-layer substrate
Top-layer stacking order across multiple open dialogs — needs top-layer registry + paint-order substrate
Top-layer containing block is the initial containing block, not the static ancestor
Top-layer + display: none interaction
Top-layer nesting order
Top-layer membership when element is detached — needs top-layer substrate
::backdrop descendant selector — needs backdrop pseudo-element
::backdrop dynamic style change — needs backdrop pseudo-element
::backdrop in-flow positioning — needs backdrop pseudo-element
::backdrop inheritance — needs backdrop pseudo-element
::backdrop stacking order with top-layer parent
Fixed-position child of a dialog ancestor with transform/contain/will-change/filter — top-layer escapes the ancestor's containing block
Cross-feature dialog+popover top-layer stacking interaction
Popover ::backdrop with various parent contexts (checkbox / img / iframe / progress / textarea) — top-layer pseudo substrate
Popover ::backdrop appearance — top-layer pseudo substrate
Popover stacking context vs top-layer — same out-of-flow substrate as dialog top-layer
:popover-open + display switching — needs top-layer membership transition
Popover open-state display rules — needs top-layer + display:none toggling under :popover-open
Popover anchor positioning — requires anchor-positioning substrate (CSS Anchor Positioning 1)
Popover anchor positioning — requires anchor-positioning substrate (CSS Anchor Positioning 1)
Fieldset acts as its own containing block — needs fieldset anonymous contents-box substrate
Fieldset paint order: border with legend gap on top of background
Fieldset border radius interacts with legend gap clipping
Border gap follows legend when legend is position: relative
Overflow on fieldset (vs anonymous contents-box) — needs box-model split
Empty scrollable fieldset — overflow + anonymous contents-box interaction
Legend with position: relative — legend keeps participating in fieldset border-box even when offset
Legend auto margins — legend block-axis margin behaviour in fieldset border-box
Tall legend pushes fieldset content down
Legend block margins in fieldset border-box
Legend display: contents/inline/etc. inside fieldset
Button scrollbar reservation — anonymous content box
Button anonymous content box substrate
Button overflow: hidden clip — anonymous content box clipping
Checkbox box-model specifics — input widget intrinsic sizing
Radio box-model specifics — same widget intrinsic-sizing substrate
CSS-customizable-select pseudos (::picker, ::checkmark, ::picker-icon, before/after on grid). Brand-new CSS feature (2025)
<input type=image> default rendering — image-replaced control sizing
`interestfor` HTML attribute + `::interest-button` pseudo-element (Open UI interest-invokers proposal, 2025). Tentative; depends on top-layer + anchor-positioning substrate
display: flex on <summary> — needs flex layout (summary normally renders as a list-item disclosure box)
<select> with size=1 intrinsic block-size — needs select widget chrome substrate
<hr color=> presentational hint maps to CSS `color` plus border-style: solid (HTML 5 §15.3). Not yet wired through applyPresentationalAttributes
<hr width=> presentational hint maps to CSS `width` with HTML-length parsing (HTML 5 §15.3)
<hr size=>/`noshade` map to height + border-style: solid (HTML 5 §15.3)
<br clear=all|left|right|both> → CSS clear mapping (HTML 5 §15.3) — not yet wired through applyPresentationalAttributes
<table border> → border-width/-style on table + inset border on td (HTML 5 §15.3). Not yet in applyPresentationalAttributes
<table border> presentational hint — quirks-mode variant
<table border> presentational hint — standards-mode variant
Table background propagation under print media — needs print-mode page-break-aware background painting
<tbody> intrinsic height distribution — needs table row-group sizing rules from CSS Tables 3
Transform on <tr> — needs transform-from-row containment + will-change box invalidation in table layout

Legacy <frameset> rows attribute with percentage sizes

Absolute-positioned replaced element with percentage max-height in auto-height containing block — transferred constraint resolution from CSS 2.2 §10.3.7
